s: In 1987, De Wayne Buice suited up for CAL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.390, WHIP 1.110, SO 109, WAR 2.100.
In 1988, De Wayne Buice suited up for CAL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.880, WHIP 1.550, SO 38, WAR 0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (CAL -> TOR).
In 1989, De Wayne Buice suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.820, WHIP 1.530, SO 10, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined TOR.
